target_keywords: the man is giving a thumbs up while on his phone.
question: Can you describe the main features of this image for me?
source_answer_text: artistic sculptures and images on a city street
target_answer_text: The image depicts a group of people gathered inside a room, creating a lively social atmosphere. A man is prominently featured in the scene, holding a cell phone to his ear and smiling with a thumbs-up gesture, possibly posing for a picture or simply enjoying the conversation. There are multiple other people in the room, adding to the gathering and engaging in various conversations. The scene also has two cups visible, one on the left side of the room and another on the right side, indicating that the gathering may be a casual social event.
